description: KeptnMetric is the Schema for the keptnmetrics API

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: KeptnMetricSpec defines the desired state of KeptnMetric

fetchIntervalSeconds.description: FetchIntervalSeconds represents the update frequency in seconds that is used to update the metric

query.description: Query represents the query to be run

range.description: Range represents the time range for which data is to be queried

aggregation.description: Aggregation defines the type of aggregation function to be applied on the data. Accepted values: p90, p95, p99, max, min, avg, median

interval.description: Interval specifies the duration of the time interval for the data query

step.description: Step represents the query resolution step width for the data query

storedResults.description: StoredResults indicates the upper limit of how many past results should be stored in the status of a KeptnMetric

status.description: KeptnMetricStatus defines the observed state of KeptnMetric

errMsg.description: ErrMsg represents the error details when the query could not be evaluated

intervalResults.description: IntervalResults contain a slice of all the interval results

errMsg.description: ErrMsg represents the error details when the query could not be evaluated

lastUpdated.description: LastUpdated represents the time when the status data was last updated

range.description: Range represents the time range for which this data was queried

aggregation.description: Aggregation defines the type of aggregation function to be applied on the data. Accepted values: p90, p95, p99, max, min, avg, median

interval.description: Interval specifies the duration of the time interval for the data query

step.description: Step represents the query resolution step width for the data query

storedResults.description: StoredResults indicates the upper limit of how many past results should be stored in the status of a KeptnMetric

lastUpdated.description: LastUpdated represents the time when the status data was last updated

rawValue.description: RawValue represents the resulting value in raw format
